title: Design feature intervention matrix after learner sensitivity ladder
rationale: Phase 1 should only widen into feature interventions after the learner sensitivity branch has been explicitly audited.

rule.name: Design feature intervention matrix after learner sensitivity ladder
rule.hypothesis: Once learner sensitivity is better characterized, matched feature interventions can test whether quality, difficulty, or coverage dimensions have separable response signal.
rule.rationale: Phase 1 should only widen into feature interventions after the learner sensitivity branch has been explicitly audited.
